top_signals.title: Gold Falls as Inflation Risks Outweigh Progress in US-Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Gold fell as inflationary concerns overshadowed early optimism around negotiations to resolve the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Qualcomm Nears Deal for AI Chip Startup Modular
top_signals.summary: Qualcomm Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire Modular Inc. in a transaction valuing the artificial intelligence infrastructure software company at about $4 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aluminum Falls as Peace Talk Progress Points to Returning Supply
top_signals.summary: Aluminum touched a three-month low as progress in Middle East peace talks fueled expectations of a return of supplies from the key metal-producing region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Greenspan’s legacy: From irrational exuberance to 2008 crisis
top_signals.summary: Some saw the Federal Reserve chair as a driving force for change at the Fed and a guiding light for investors, even as the 2008-09 global financial crisis clouds his legacy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Securitize and tZERO clash over patents as race to bring Wall Street onchain heats up
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: In South Korea, a job or partner at Samsung or SK Hynix is the new ‘A+’ catch
top_signals.summary: South Korean matchmaking firms say people working at the companies are now being ranked alongside doctors, lawyers and those from other traditionally elite professions.

top_signals.title: CME Sues U.S. Regulator to Stop Kalshi From Offering Popular ‘Perp’ Futures - WSJ
top_signals.summary: CME Sues U.S. Regulator to Stop Kalshi From Offering Popular ‘Perp’ Futures  WSJ
